free_text: HELIUM PRODUCTION IN PURE ELEMENTS, ISOTOPES, AND
LAWRENCE LIVERMORE ROTATING TARGET NEUTRON SOURCE
HIGH SENSITIVITY MASS SPECTROMETER TO MEASURE HELIUM.
RADIOMETRIC FOILS INCLUDING THIN DISKS OF NB,AU,CO,FE,
TOTAL HELIUM PRODUCTION MEASURED BY ISOTOPE-DILUTION
NEUTRON FLUENCE DETERMINATION IS LARGEST SOURCE OF
CROSS SECTION UNCERTAINTY. ERROR IN FLUENCE IS
+-6 TO 7 PERCENT WHICH INCLUDES RELATIVE UNCERTAINTY
OF FLUENCE MAP(+-3.5 TO 5 PERCENT), ABSOLUTE
PERCENT), AND ABSOLUTE UNCERTAINTY IN MONITOR CROSS
UNCERTAINTY DUE TO HELIUM MEASUREMENT - 2 PERCENT
CORRECTION APPLIED TO UNENCAPSULATED SAMPLES FOR
NOT CORRECTED FOR DEGRADED NEUTRON EFFECTS. SYSTEMATIC
NOT CORRECTED FOR DEGRADED NEUTRON EFFECTS. SYSTEMATIC
DEDUCED BY MATRIX UNFOLDING OF RTNS-II RESULTS FOR
NATURAL MOLYBDENUM AND OTHER 6 ENRICHED ISOTOPES.
